title: Lip-Labour.
content:
In the old Scripture I have often read,
    The calf without meal ne'er was offered;
    To figure to us nothing more than this,
    Without the heart lip-labour nothing is.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Lip-Labour."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
